stories.title: Blog platform
stories.description: This is my personal website. Accept markdown posts with front matter to add new blog posts
acceptanceCriteria: Markdown files with front matter rendered as posts
Posts auto added to writing section on home page

stories.title: Blog page looks terrible
stories.description: The blog page looks absolutely terrible. There's no nav bar, there's no editing, there's nothing useful here. You need to use the PlayWright MCP server in order to figure out the login style of the home page and then design a blog page around that using the web design skill.
acceptanceCriteria: Blog page has a navigation and has a good layout.
The layout is consistent with a typical blog that takes into account the design of the overall web page. Specifically the home page.

stories.title: blog page footer is like half the page
stories.description: Blog page footer is like half the page, make it a reasonable and fixed size at the bottom of the page and the content take up the majority.
acceptanceCriteria: The butter is fixed and at the bottom it takes up as minimal space as needed and the blog page takes up the rest.

stories.title: Mix in the manually entered blog posts as pseudo blog posts inside of the actual blog itself.
stories.description: I have a number of blog posts imported from other sources like Medium and Dev.TO. I need these to be kind of mixed into my blog posts. We have dates and everything already. We just kind of need to make these pseudo blog posts with the inside the middleman software. But the linking goes out to the actual application that that thing is hosted on.
acceptanceCriteria: All blog posts in the manually entered config are injected into the vlog.
Blog posts and manually entered Config based blog posts are interspersed and sorted correctly by date.
All blog functionality works with these manually entered config based blogs.
